title: Polish Beef Stew
description: A hearty, gluten-free Polish-inspired beef stew made with tender beef, rich flavors, and comforting intensity.
instructions: 1. Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
2. Brown the beef cubes in batches, about 5 minutes per batch. Remove from pot and set aside.
3. Add the chopped onion to the pot and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
4. Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
5. Add the chopped carrots and potatoes to the pot and cook for 5 minutes.
6. Add the browned beef, intense broth, malty beer, and polish rye flour to the pot.
7. Stir to combine and bring to a boil.
8. Reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, for 1 1/2 hours.
9. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
10. Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley if desired.
